subject: Probopass, a round rocky Pokemon with a large red nose extension and three small satellite units floating around its body
description: A squat, rounded rocky Pokemon sits centrally in the frame. It has a prominent red nose structure extending forward and three small dark oval satellite units arranged around it. The body is dark grey-brown and stone-textured. The background shows a simple outdoor sky environment with soft blue tones. The figure's expression is stoic, with small eyes. Its posture is static and sentinel-like.
foreground: squat rounded rocky Pokemon with large red nose and three floating satellite mini-noses
background: soft blue sky, minimal outdoor background
